features.title: Naming and Path Migration
features.description: Rename plugin from long-running-harness to harness. Namespace all commands with harness: prefix. Rename artifact files (feature-list.json to features.json, run-state.json to state.json). Move artifact folder from artifacts/ to .harness/. Standardize feature ID format to F-XXX. Update all 18+ files with new paths, names, and references.
steps: Verify plugin directory is renamed from long-running-harness to harness
Verify all commands use harness: prefix (harness:init, harness:run, harness:session, harness:reset)
Verify feature-list.json is renamed to features.json
Verify run-state.json is renamed to state.json
Verify artifact folder path changed from artifacts/ to .harness/
Verify feature IDs use F-XXX format in all files
Grep all plugin files for stale references to old paths (artifacts/, feature-list.json, run-state.json, long-running-harness)
evidence: Sprint 1: all 18+ files updated with new paths, command namespacing, and ID format. Old skill directory removed, new skills/harness/ created. Command files renamed to harness:* prefix. All references to artifacts/ changed to .harness/, feature-list.json to features.json, run-state.json to state.json, feature-NNN to F-NNN.
features.notes: Foundation feature. All other features depend on this. Completed sprint 1.

features.title: Migration Command
features.description: New /harness:migrate command that detects old-format projects (artifacts/ dir, feature-list.json, feature-NNN IDs) and migrates them to the new format. Every other command gains a migration check at the top that warns the user if old format is detected.
steps: Verify harness:migrate command file exists at commands/harness:migrate.md
Verify command detects artifacts/ directory presence
Verify command detects feature-list.json filename
Verify command detects feature-NNN ID format
Verify migration renames files and directories to new format
Verify other commands include migration check warning at top
evidence: Sprint 3: Created commands/harness:migrate.md with full migration workflow (artifacts/ -> .harness/, feature-list.json -> features.json, run-state.json -> state.json, feature-XXX -> F-XXX ID conversion). Added Migration Check section to all four existing commands (harness:init, harness:run, harness:session, harness:reset) that warns users if old format detected. Verification: bash artifacts/init.sh -> 76 PASS, 0 FAIL.

features.title: Auto-Commit After Sprint
features.description: After each sprint evaluation, auto-commit with conventional commit message format. feat(F-XXX) for pass, wip(F-XXX) for fail. Update coordinator, generator, and session command.
steps: Verify coordinator.md includes auto-commit instructions after evaluation
Verify commit message format: feat(F-XXX): <title> -- sprint N [harness] for pass
Verify commit message format: wip(F-XXX): <title> -- sprint N attempt [harness] for fail
Verify generator.md references auto-commit workflow
Verify session command references auto-commit workflow

features.title: Release and Versioning
features.description: New releaser agent and role. New /harness:release command. New artifacts: .harness/release.json and .harness/changelog.md. Coordinator spawns releaser after all required features pass. Git tag created on release.
steps: Verify releaser agent file exists at agents/releaser.md
Verify releaser role file exists at skills/harness/roles/releaser.md
Verify harness:release command file exists at commands/harness:release.md
Verify release.json schema is documented in patterns.md
Verify changelog.md generation is described in releaser role
Verify coordinator.md spawns releaser after all required features pass
Verify git tag creation is part of release workflow

features.title: Development Methodology Selection
features.description: During /harness:init, prompt user to choose methodology: agile (default), waterfall, scrum, or kanban. Store in state.json. Planner generates methodology-aware specs. SKILL.md documents mappings.
steps: Verify harness:init command includes methodology selection prompt
Verify state.json schema includes methodology field
Verify planner role references methodology for spec generation
Verify SKILL.md documents methodology mappings (agile, waterfall, scrum, kanban)
Verify agile is the default methodology

features.title: Testing Strategy
features.description: New tester agent and role. test-plan.md artifact generated during init. NN-test-report.md per sprint. Updated sprint flow with tester between generator and evaluator. Evaluator gains TEST-01 and TEST-02 contract checks.
steps: Verify tester agent file exists at agents/tester.md
Verify tester role file exists at skills/harness/roles/tester.md
Verify test-plan.md artifact is generated during init
Verify NN-test-report.md template exists in patterns.md
Verify sprint flow in SKILL.md shows tester between generator and evaluator
Verify evaluator role includes TEST-01 (tests exist) and TEST-02 (tests pass) checks

features.title: Code Review and Codex Integration
features.description: New reviewer agent and role. Auto-detect codex plugin. When available, use /codex:adversarial-review. When not available, perform Claude-based code review. NN-review.md per sprint. Reviewer runs after tester, before evaluator.
steps: Verify reviewer agent file exists at agents/reviewer.md
Verify reviewer role file exists at skills/harness/roles/reviewer.md
Verify reviewer detects codex plugin in .claude/settings.json
Verify fallback to Claude-based review when codex not available
Verify NN-review.md template exists in patterns.md
Verify sprint flow shows reviewer after tester and before evaluator

features.title: Architect Role
features.description: New architect agent and role. Design review for complex projects (more than 10 features). .harness/architecture.md artifact. Spawned during init when complexity warrants it. Optional and brackets-activated.
steps: Verify architect agent file exists at agents/architect.md
Verify architect role file exists at skills/harness/roles/architect.md
Verify architecture.md artifact template exists in patterns.md
Verify architect is spawned only for projects with more than 10 features
Verify architect is shown in brackets in sprint flow (optional role)

features.title: Reliability Fixes
features.description: Seven sub-items: API error retry with 30s delay, context freshness handoff every 3 rounds, sprint resume via current_sprint_phase field, evaluator enforcement, sprint artifact enforcement, cost/duration tracking, cross-platform init scripts.
steps: Verify coordinator.md includes API error retry logic (retry once after 30s, pause on retry failure)
Verify coordinator.md includes context freshness: handoff and pause after every 3 rounds
Verify state.json schema includes current_sprint_phase field (idle, contract, implementation, testing, review, evaluation)
Verify session command resumes from correct phase using current_sprint_phase
Verify coordinator must not update features.json directly; must validate evaluation artifacts exist before advancing
Verify contract.md, evaluation.md, evaluation.json must all exist before sprint advances
Verify state.json includes cost_tracking with per-round timestamps
Verify both init.sh and init.bat are generated; init.sh detects Windows

features.title: Install and Metadata Update
features.description: Updated install.sh and install.bat with new paths and all new files. Updated plugin.json (name=harness, version=0.2.0). Updated openai.yaml. Full README rewrite. Add --uninstall flag to remove old artifacts.
steps: Verify install.sh copies all new files to correct destination paths
Verify install.bat copies all new files to correct destination paths
Verify plugin.json has name=harness and version=0.2.0
Verify openai.yaml is updated with new agent references
Verify README.md documents all commands, agents, and new artifact layout
Verify install.sh supports --uninstall flag
Verify --uninstall removes old artifacts directory and stale files
evidence: Sprint 2: install.sh rewritten with --uninstall flag, new directory targets (skills/harness/roles/, skills/harness/references/), portable colon-filename handling. install.bat rewritten with matching --uninstall support. plugin.json updated to name=harness version=0.2.0. openai.yaml updated with new display_name and default_prompt referencing /harness: commands. README.md fully rewritten with command table, role table, artifact layout, 4 new roles listed as coming in v0.2.0. Verification: bash artifacts/init.sh -> 76 PASS, 0 FAIL.
